title: Republic Act No. 8243
text:
H. No. 3490

Republic of the Philippines Congress of the Philippines Metro Manila

Tenth Congress

Second Regular Session

Begun and held in Metro Manila, on Monday, the twenty- second day of July, nineteen hundred and ninety-six.

[REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8243]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARANGAY SALLACONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BANTAY, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, TO BARANGAY SAN MARIANO

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barangay Sallacong in the Municipality of Bantay, Province of Ilocos Sur, is hereby changed to Barangay San Mariano.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES President of the Senate

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA, JR. Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 25, 1996 and September 30, 1996, respectively.

(Sgd.) HAZEL P. GACUTAN Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: DEC 20 1996

(Sgd.) FIDEL V. RAMOS President of the Philippines

Source: Presidential Management Staff
